# Medicare Psych Comorbidity Mappings - ICD10 diagnosis codes with decimals
# File created for Medicare Inpatient FY2026: (08/11/2025 KC)
#
# This file contains the comorbidity mappings used with Medicare Psych
# Combined Comorbidity Assignment. The adjustment factors and comorbidity categories
# in this file have been set by CMS effective 10/01/2025.  It provides the 
# adjustment factor and comorbidity category for each psychiatric ICD10 secondary 
# diagnosis code that is eligible for an adjustment per CMS source data found on 
# CMS website. 
#
# This file is selected on the Date and File tab of the Psych Combined Comorbidity 
# Factors Assignment screen. It should be copied to a directory accessible by the
# person running this calculation.
# 
# Note that if more than one code exists for an encounter that is mapped to the 
# same comorbidity category, the assignment will apply the adjustment only one time.
#
#
# The ICD10 diagnosis codes used below include decimals.
#
# Comorbidity Category Definitions
#  1 - Developmental Disabilities
#  2 - Coagulation Factor Deficits
#  3 - Tracheostomy
#  4 - Renal Failure, Acute
#  5 - Renal Failure, Chronic
#  6 - Oncology Treatment
#  7 - Uncontrolled Type 1 Diabetes - Mellitus with or without complications
#  8 - Severe Protein Calorie Malnutrition
#  9 - Eating and Conduct Disorders
# 10 - Infectious Diseases
# 11 - Drug/Alcohol Induced Mental Disorders
# 12 - Cardiac Conditions
# 13 - Gangrene
# 14 - Chronic Obstructive Pulmonary Disease
# 15 - Artificial Openings - Digestive and Urinary
# 16 - Severe Musculoskeletal & Connective Tissue Diseases
# 17 - Poisoning
#
#Record Format: secondary diagnosis code|adjustment factor|comorbidity category
F70.|1.04|1
F71.|1.04|1
F72.|1.04|1
F73.|1.04|1
F78.A1|1.04|1
F78.A9|1.04|1
F79.|1.04|1
J95.00|1.09|3
J95.01|1.09|3
J95.02|1.09|3
J95.03|1.09|3
